holdings.infoBox: FTHI is an equity ETF with a total of 176 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.07%, NVIDIA at 5.57%, Dreyfus Govt Cm Inst 289 at 4.85%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.51%, and ASML Holding at 2.46%.

overview.description: The First Trust BuyWrite Income ETF (FTHI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US-listed stocks, with an overlay of short calls on the S&P 500. FTHI was launched on Jan 6, 2014 and is issued by First Trust.
